lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਹਜੈ ਦਾ ਖੇਤੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਲਾਏ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sahajai daa khet hai jis no laae bhaau |
lines.english: The True Guru is the field of intuitive wisdom. One who is inspired to love Him,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥ ਜੋਧੈ ਵੀਰੈ ਪੂਰਬਾਣੀ ਕੀ ਧੁਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: raamakalee kee vaar mahalaa 3 | jodhai veerai poorabaanee kee dhunee |
lines.english: Vaar Of Raamkalee, Third Mehl, To Be Sung To The Tune Of 'Jodha And Veera Poorbaanee':

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਏਹੋ ਬੀਜੁ ਹੈ ਸਹਸਾ ਗਇਆ ਵਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: haumai eho beej hai sahasaa geaa vilaae |
lines.english: But this egotism is the seed of skepticism; it has been uprooted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਬੀਜੇ ਨਾਉ ਉਗਵੈ ਨਾਮੇ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naau beeje naau ugavai naame rahai samaae |
lines.english: plants the seed of the Name there. The Name sprouts up, and he remains absorbed in the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਭੈ ਸੇਤੀ ਅੰਭੁ ਰਲਿਆ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਨਿਕਸਿਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: anbhai setee anbh raliaa bahurr na nikasiaa jaae |
lines.english: When water mixes with water, it cannot be separated again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਬੀਜੇ ਨ ਉਗਵੈ ਜੋ ਬਖਸੇ ਸੋ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naa kichh beeje na ugavai jo bakhase so khaae |
lines.english: It is not planted there, and it does not sprout; whatever God grants us, we eat.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਚਲਤੁ ਹੈ ਵੇਖਹੁ ਲੋਕਾ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh chalat hai vekhahu lokaa aae |
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh is wonderful; come, poeple, and see!

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਵੇਖਾਲੇ ਸੋ ਵੇਖੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jis vekhaale so vekhai jis vasiaa man maeh |1|
lines.english: He alone sees, whom the Lord causes to see; the Lord comes to dwell in his mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਕੁ ਕਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਬਪੁੜਾ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਸੋਝੀ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: lok ki vekhai bapurraa jis no sojhee naeh |
lines.english: But what can the poor people see? They do not understand.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਵਿਚਿ ਜੰਮੈ ਦੁਖਿ ਮਰੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਕਰਤ ਵਿਹਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dukh vich jamai dukh marai haumai karat vihaae |
lines.english: In sorrow he is born, and in sorrow he dies. Acting in egotism, his life passes away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਦੁਖ ਕਾ ਖੇਤੁ ਹੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਬੀਜੇ ਦੁਖੁ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh dukh kaa khet hai dukh beeje dukh khaae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is the field of sorrow and suffering. He plains sorrow, and eats sorrow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਦੇਵੈ ਤਿਸੈ ਨ ਜਾਣਈ ਦਿਤੇ ਕਉ ਲਪਟਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo devai tisai na jaanee dite kau lapattaae |
lines.english: He does not know the One who gives, but he is attached to what is given.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣੁ ਨ ਸੁਝਈ ਅੰਧਾ ਅੰਧੁ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaan na sujhee andhaa andh kamaae |
lines.english: He does not understand the coming and going of reincarnation; the blind man acts in blindness.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਕਮਾਵਣਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕਰਣਾ ਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak poorab likhiaa kamaavanaa avar na karanaa jaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, he acts according to his pre-ordained destiny. He cannot do anything else. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲੇ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur miliai sadaa sukh jis no aape mele soe |
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, everlasting peace is obtained. He Himself leads us to meet Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੈ ਏਹੁ ਬਿਬੇਕੁ ਹੈ ਅੰਤਰੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sukhai ehu bibek hai antar niramal hoe |
lines.english: This is the true meaning of peace, that one becomes immaculate within oneself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਿਆਨ ਕਾ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਕਟੀਐ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: agiaan kaa bhram katteeai giaan paraapat hoe |
lines.english: The doubt of ignorance is eradicated, and spiritual wisdom is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਏਕੋ ਨਦਰੀ ਆਇਆ ਜਹ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਸੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak eko nadaree aaeaa jeh dekhaa teh soe |3|
lines.english: Nanak comes to gaze upon the One Lord alone; wherever he looks, there He is. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਤਖਤੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ਬੈਸਣ ਕਉ ਜਾਂਈ ॥
lines.translit: sachai takhat rachaaeaa baisan kau jaanee |
lines.english: The True Lord created His throne, upon which He sits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਸਾਜੀਅਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਮਹਲ ਸਰਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aape kudarat saajeean kar mehal saraaee |
lines.english: Through His almighty creative power, He created and fashioned the mansions and hotels.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh aape aap hai gur sabad sunaaee |
lines.english: He Himself is everything; this is what the Word of the Guru's Shabad says.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੰਦੁ ਸੂਰਜੁ ਦੁਇ ਚਾਨਣੇ ਪੂਰੀ ਬਣਤ ਬਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: chand sooraj due chaanane pooree banat banaaee |
lines.english: He made the two lamps, the sun and the moon; He formed the perfect form.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਵੇਖੈ ਸੁਣੇ ਆਪਿ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਧਿਆਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape vekhai sune aap gur sabad dhiaaee |1|
lines.english: He Himself sees, and He Himself hears; meditate on the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬੀਰ ਮਹਿਦੀ ਕਰਿ ਕੈ ਘਾਲਿਆ ਆਪੁ ਪੀਸਾਇ ਪੀਸਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kabeer mahidee kar kai ghaaliaa aap peesaae peesaae |
lines.english: Kabeer, I have ground myself into henna paste.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਹੁ ਵਾਹੁ ਸਚੇ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹ ਤੂ ਸਚੀ ਨਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: vaahu vaahu sache paatisaah too sachee naaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Waaho! Waaho! Hail, hail, O True King! True is Your Name. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੈ ਸਹ ਬਾਤ ਨ ਪੁਛੀਆ ਕਬਹੂ ਨ ਲਾਈ ਪਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tai seh baat na puchheea kabahoo na laaee paae |1|
lines.english: O my Husband Lord, You took no notice of me; You never applied me to Your feet. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਹਿਦੀ ਕਰਿ ਕੈ ਰਖਿਆ ਸੋ ਸਹੁ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak mahidee kar kai rakhiaa so sahu nadar karee |
lines.english: O Nanak, my Husband Lord keeps me like henna paste; He blesses me with His Glance of Grace.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਪਿਰਮ ਪਿਆਲਾ ਖਸਮ ਕਾ ਜੈ ਭਾਵੈ ਤੈ ਦੇਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: eihu piram piaalaa khasam kaa jai bhaavai tai dee |2|
lines.english: This is the cup of love of my Lord and Master; He gives it as He chooses. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਪੀਸੈ ਆਪੇ ਘਸੈ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਲਾਇ ਲਏਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape peesai aape ghasai aape hee laae lee |
lines.english: He Himself grinds me, and He Himself rubs me; He Himself applies me to His feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਕੀ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਉਪਾਈਅਨੁ ਸਭ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ਸਮਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: vekee srisatt upaaeean sabh hukam aavai jaae samaahee |
lines.english: You created the world with its variety; by the Hukam of Your Command, it comes, goes, and merges again in You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਵੇਖਿ ਵਿਗਸਦਾ ਦੂਜਾ ਕੋ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: aape vekh vigasadaa doojaa ko naahee |
lines.english: You Yourself see, and blossom forth; there is no one else at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਖੁ ਤੂ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਬੁਝਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jiau bhaavai tiau rakh too gur sabad bujhaahee |
lines.english: As it pleases You, You keep me. Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, I understand You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਤੇਰਾ ਜੋਰੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਚਲਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa teraa jor hai jiau bhaavai tivai chalaahee |
lines.english: You are the strength of all. As it pleases You, You lead us on.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਜੇਵਡ ਮੈ ਨਾਹਿ ਕੋ ਕਿਸੁ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tudh jevadd mai naeh ko kis aakh sunaaee |2|
lines.english: There is no other as great as You; unto whom should I speak and talk? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਈ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਫਿਰੀ ਫਾਵੀ ਹੋਈ ਭਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: bharam bhulaaee sabh jag firee faavee hoee bhaal |
lines.english: Deluded by doubt, I wandered over the whole world. Searching, I became frustrated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:
